name: First Cash Pawn
description_short: FirstCash is the leading international pawn shop operator with 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, the UK, and Latin America, offering pawn loans, retail sales, gold buying, and layaway services.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the leading international pawn store chain with a footprint spanning 29 U.S. states, Washington D.C., the United Kingdom, and Latin America (Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador). The company employs approximately 22,000 people and is a publicly traded component of both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and the Russell 2000 Index, indicating significant scale and institutional credibility in the alternative financial services space.

The company primarily serves cash and credit-constrained consumers through three core service lines: pawn loans (non-recourse loans secured by pledged personal property), retail merchandise sales (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments), and gold/precious metals buying. FirstCash also operates AFF, a wholly owned subsidiary that provides lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through over 15,000 active merchant partner locations nationwide. Additionally, the company offers layaway services with a 10% down payment structure for consumers seeking flexible purchasing options.

FirstCash distinguishes itself through its massive network scale (3,300+ stores), international presence across multiple continents, and diversified revenue streams beyond traditional pawn lending. The company maintains significant institutional investment and public market recognition, which suggests operational sophistication and regulatory compliance. Their website prominently features store locators, layaway options, and gold-buying services, indicating a consumer-friendly approach to alternative lending and merchandise sales.

The primary caveat is that pawn loans, while useful for emergency cash access without credit checks, involve surrendering personal property and typically carry higher effective costs than traditional loans. Consumers must understand that failure to redeem pledged items results in permanent loss of property, and the terms are non-negotiable based on collateral valuation. As a for-profit public company, FirstCash's pricing reflects market rates for collateral-based lending rather than consumer advocacy.
address: 3730 N Belt Line Rd, Irving, TX 75038

company_info.headquarters: 3730 N Belt Line Rd, Irving, TX 75038

pros: 3,300+ retail locations across 29 U.S. states plus UK and Latin America, enabling convenient local access
No credit check required for pawn loans—accessible to consumers with poor or no credit history
Fast, same-day cash advances secured by personal property with transparent collateral-based valuation
Diverse merchandise inventory (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, instruments) available for purchase
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400 and Russell 2000 component) suggesting regulatory compliance and transparency
Layaway service with affordable 10% down payment option for budget-conscious shoppers
Gold and precious metals buying service providing immediate cash for valuable items
Non-recourse loans mean borrowers only lose pledged collateral, not additional personal assets or wage garnishment
cons: Pawn loans carry implicit high interest rates through collateral-based valuations that heavily favor the lender
Loss of pledged property upon default is permanent with no redemption grace period or negotiation flexibility
Effective APR on pawn loans typically exceeds 100% when calculated on annualized basis, making them expensive relative to alternatives
Company's market dominance and scale may reduce competitive pricing pressure at individual store locations
Retail merchandise quality and selection varies by location; no quality guarantees on used goods
best_for: Unbanked or credit-constrained consumers needing immediate cash without credit checks or income verification
Individuals with valuable personal property (jewelry, electronics, instruments) willing to pledge collateral for short-term liquidity
Budget shoppers seeking discounted used merchandise (electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods) from liquidated or pawned items
Consumers preferring layaway purchases over credit cards, with ability to pay 10% down and installments without debt
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for unbanked or credit-constrained consumers needing immediate cash without credit checks, or budget shoppers seeking discounted used merchandise. The primary caveat is that pawn loans, while accessible, carry very high implicit interest rates (often exceeding 100% APR) and result in permanent property loss upon default—making them a true last-resort option suitable only for short-term emergencies where the borrower can realistically redeem the pledged item within 30-90 days.
services: Pawn loans secured by pledged personal property (non-recourse)
Retail sales of jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Gold, silver, and precious metals buying and evaluation
Layaway service with 10% down payment structure
Store locator tool for finding 3,300+ locations
Merchandise inventory browsing and shopping online
Lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through AFF subsidiary (15,000+ merchant partners)
Point-of-sale payment solutions for cash and credit-constrained consumers
FAQ and educational content on how pawn loans work
Cash payment on spot for gold and valuable merchandise
